overview: Giant Bat is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Goblin Cave, Ice Cavern, Ruins, Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): -10 HP, 15 physical damage, 180 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 2, MaxImpactEndurance 3. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack2 at 140% ratio (210 base damage). Sight range 900, combat radius 90. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Ultrasonic Wave Nightmare.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 3 melee attacks. Attack1 (120%), Attack2 (140%), Attack1 Combo (120%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Dizziness
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Dizziness icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Giant Bat Nightmare Dizziness
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Giant Bat Nightmare Dizziness icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Light
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Light (-4000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Ultrasonic Wave Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Ultrasonic Wave Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 900 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 900 units, loses target at 2000 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 90, ability check distance 135
strategies.description: Combat area radius 90. Ability check distance 135. Ability attack delay: 0.25s.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Ultrasonic Wave Nightmare

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 900 units. Loses target at 2000 units.
